name: 17p13_3_Miller_Dieker_lissencephaly
description: Miller-Dieker syndrome (17p13.3 microdeletion ~3-4 Mb) and isolated lissencephaly sequence — contiguous gene-deletion syndrome encompassing PAFAH1B1 (LIS1) and YWHAE. Subtelomeric SD blocks at 17p13.3 mediate a fraction of breakpoints. Reciprocal 17p13.3 duplication causes a milder ID/autism phenotype.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD cluster at 17p13.3 (~50-200 kb blocks); critical dosage-sensitive genes PAFAH1B1 (LIS1; lissencephaly), YWHAE (developmental brain), CRK, RPH3AL. Larger MDS deletions remove both LIS1+YWHAE; isolated lissencephaly removes LIS1 only.
